seo.title: Cheese and Onion Bread - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 500 g flour (self-raising flour)
  • 5 ml salt
  • 4 finely chopped spring onions (spring onions), green tips and all
  • 65 ml dried onion flakes (you can leave these out, but they're available at Woolies)
  • 150 g small cubes of strong cheddar cheese
  • 500 ml buttermilk

Method

Sift the flour and salt together in a mixing bowl.

Add the spring onions, onion flakes and cheese and mix lightly. Pour in the buttermilk and mix well.

Spoon into a medium-sized bread pan (21 x 11 cm) or any other shaped pan of your choice and bake at 190 degrees for 45 – 60 minutes or until a skewer comes out clean.

Serve warm with garlic butter and tomato salsa.

Easy!
